supporting_quote: AGT mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®. Results are presented as percent inhibition of AGT, relative to untreated control
notes: Ionis. Real-time PCR, primer-probe sets RTS3721/RTS4039. Cyclophilin A mentioned only in the generic methods boilerplate ('using either ... cyclophilin A, or by quantifying total RNA using RIBOGREEN'); the AGT assay results use RIBOGREEN total RNA.

supporting_quote: UBE3A-ATS RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®. Reduction of UBE3A-ATS RNA is presented in the tables below as percent UBE3A-ATS RNA amount relative to untreated control
notes: Ionis. Target is UBE3A-ATS. In-vitro iCell GABANeurons assay (primer-probe RTS4796/RTS35984/RTS40595) uses RIBOGREEN total RNA. GAPDH (RTS108) appears only for MOUSE in-vivo studies ('normalized to mouse GAPDH'), not the assigned neuron cell line.

supporting_quote: SMAD7 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®. Results are presented as percent inhibition of SMAD7 mRNA expression, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis. Hep3B in-vitro assay (primer-probe RTS5062) uses RIBOGREEN total RNA. Housekeeping genes GAPDH and HPRT1 (HTS7555) are used only for MOUSE in-vivo tissue Smad7, not the human Hep3B cell line.

supporting_quote: MALAT1 RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®. Results are presented in the tables below as percent control of the amount of MALAT1 RNA relative to untreated control cells (% UTC).
notes: Ionis. Primary A-431 and HepG2 assays (primer-probe RTS2736/RTS2738) use RIBOGREEN total RNA. b-actin (HTS5002) normalization appears only for a separate MDA-MB-436 free-uptake dose study, NOT the assigned A431/HepG2 cell lines.

supporting_quote: Tau mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®. Results are presented as percent inhibition of tau, relative to untreated control
notes: Ionis. MAPT/tau, primer-probe RTS3104. Real-time PCR normalized to RIBOGREEN total RNA. Cyclophilin A mentioned only in generic methods boilerplate, not used for the tau results.
